name: ASCEND Enterprise Quality Gate
description: Default quality gate enforced by the ASCEND framework. Apply via SonarQube UI or via the SonarQube REST API.

conditions.description: New code must maintain Security Rating A
New code must maintain Reliability Rating A
New code must maintain Maintainability Rating A
New code coverage must be at least 80%
Duplicated new lines must be below 3%
All new security hotspots must be reviewed
Zero critical rule violations on new code
